top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS hydrogen_percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR206';

SELECT 
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS hydrogen_percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR206';

SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = m.molecule_id), 4) AS percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR206' AND a.element = 'H';

SELECT 
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN a.element = 'H' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 4) AS hydrogen_percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR206';

SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = m.molecule_id), 4) AS percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR206' AND a.element = 'H';
